Alison's LLM Plugins
RSS

Alison's LLM Plugins

This is a personal project of mine focused on helping LLMs become better partners in coding and software engineering. I’m building practical skills, tools, and guidance that make models more useful for real development work, not just demos. The goal is to help them produce better code, make better engineering decisions, and fit more naturally into modern software workflows. It’s designed to be useful across both Claude and Codex, with an emphasis on capabilities that actually matter to developers.

Download all pluginsOne ZIP containing every plugin bundle — install offline at any time

Add this marketplace to Claude Code

Use the GitHub repository as the primary marketplace source, then install one of the published plugins. Individual skills are included within those plugins; they are not listed as standalone plugins.

1. Add marketplace (recommended)
/plugin marketplace add alisonaquinas/llm-skills

Marketplace repo: alisonaquinas/llm-skills

2. Install a plugin
Shared Skills
/plugin install shared-skills@llm-skills
CI/CD Skills
/plugin install ci-cd@llm-skills
Software Design Skills
/plugin install software-design@llm-skills
Doc Skills
/plugin install doc-skills@llm-skills
Web Design Skills
/plugin install web-design-skills@llm-skills
Marketplace URL (secondary option)
/plugin marketplace add https://alisonaquinas.github.io/llm-skills/marketplace.json
🧰Shared Skillsv1.7.6

shared-skills

Cross-compatible LLM skills for Claude Code and Codex: ag, bash, changelog, chatgpt-docs, claude-docs, claude-cli, claude-cli-docs, codex-docs, codex-cli, codex-cli-docs, git, markdownlint, powershell, skill-creator, skill-linting, skill-test-drive, skill-validation, sqlite, zoxide, and many more system utilities.

Install
/plugin install shared-skills@llm-skills
109 included skillsGitHubBundle
🚀CI/CD Skillsv1.2.2

ci-cd

Cross-compatible LLM skills for CI/CD pipelines: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, and deployment workflows.

Install
/plugin install ci-cd@llm-skills
61 included skillsGitHubBundle
🏛️Software Design Skillsv1.3.0

software-design

Cross-compatible LLM skills for software design, language best practices, and source-level API documentation guidance.

Install
/plugin install software-design@llm-skills
116 included skillsGitHubBundle
📄Doc Skillsv1.2.0

doc-skills

Cross-compatible LLM skills for document workflows, text-first publishing, host-specific Markdown, and diagram authoring: OOXML, PDF, Pandoc, LaTeX, Typst, Markdown, AsciiDoc, Mermaid, PlantUML, and Graphviz.

Install
/plugin install doc-skills@llm-skills
16 included skillsGitHubBundle
🌐Web Design Skillsv1.1.0

web-design-skills

Cross-compatible LLM skills for modern web design, frontend frameworks, backend frameworks, static sites, UI systems, and web build tooling.

Install
/plugin install web-design-skills@llm-skills
16 included skillsGitHubBundle

318 included skills
